name: netflix-to-discord-forwarder
description: Poll Gmail for Netflix emails and forward them to Discord webhooks.

scripts.token:upload: node -e "require('child_process').execSync('npx vercel env rm GMAIL_TOKEN_JSON_BASE64 production --yes',{stdio:'inherit'})" && node -e "process.stdout.write(require('fs').readFileSync('secrets/gmail-token.json').toString('base64'))" | npx vercel env add GMAIL_TOKEN_JSON_BASE64 production
scripts.token:refresh: npm run auth && npm run token:upload
